lockingPolicy.lockReason: Bugfix-fastlane real-code observability fix; adversarial unit tests drive the increment/registration/redaction proof.

tdd.redGreenEvidence: delivery_attempts_total emit disabled → TestNotificationDeliveryAttemptsIncrementsOnDispatch RED (= 0, want 1); emit restored → GREEN. Full block in report.md Test Evidence.

scenarios.title: All 6 notification metric families register with bounded labels
scenarios.liveTestExpectation: All 6 smackerel_notification_* families appear in DefaultGatherer.Gather() after the emit sites are exercised, each carrying only its bounded-label allowlist.

scenarios.title: ingest_total increments on a rejected raw event
scenarios.liveTestExpectation: Service.Process nil-pool reject path increments smackerel_notification_ingest_total{source_type=ingest_fixture,source_form=webhook,status=rejected} by exactly 1; removing the ingest .Inc() turns the test RED.

scenarios.title: delivery_attempts_total increments on dispatch (success and failure)
scenarios.liveTestExpectation: OutputDispatcher.Dispatch increments delivery_attempts_total{channel=dashboard,status=success} and {channel=unconfigured,status=failure} by 1 each; RED-proven (disabling emit → = 0, want 1).

scenarios.title: action_attempts_total increments on a decision
scenarios.liveTestExpectation: DecisionEngine.Decide increments action_attempts_total{action_class=no_action,status=suppressed} by exactly 1; removing the Decide .Inc() turns the test RED.

scenarios.title: normalization_errors_total increments on an invalid raw event
scenarios.liveTestExpectation: Normalizer.Normalize error path increments normalization_errors_total{source_type=normalize_fixture,error_kind=missing_observed_at} by exactly 1; error_kind is a bounded classification, never the raw error string.

scenarios.title: dedupe_total increments on a reaction-loop suppression
scenarios.liveTestExpectation: LoopGuard.Evaluate increments dedupe_total{source_type=dedupe_fixture,suppression_kind=reaction_loop} by exactly 1; removing the loop-guard .Inc() turns the test RED.

scenarios.title: No notification metric label leaks payload content (SCN-054-024)
scenarios.liveTestExpectation: Injecting SUPERSECRET-PAYLOAD-MARKER through delivery/normalize/ingest leaves no notification-metric label value containing the marker; any payload-derived label turns the test RED.
